# Purpose
This code is a C++ source file that provides a set of functions related to task management, specifically for handling a "watchdog" mechanism in a system using `PebbleTask` objects. The functions include [`task_watchdog_mask_get`](<#task_watchdog_mask_get>), which returns a boolean value, and other functions such as [`task_watchdog_mask_set`](<#task_watchdog_mask_set>), [`task_watchdog_mask_clear`](<#task_watchdog_mask_clear>), [`task_watchdog_feed`](<#task_watchdog_feed>), and [`task_watchdog_bit_set`](<#task_watchdog_bit_set>), which perform operations on `PebbleTask` objects but currently have no implemented functionality. This code is likely part of a larger system where these functions are intended to manage task states or interactions with a watchdog timer, ensuring tasks are running correctly. The file includes a header `kernel/pebble_tasks.h`, indicating that it is part of a broader kernel or system-level library.
